title: Workday Finance to Claude Desktop MCP Server Integration
use_case: Automated expense auditing, ledger anomaly detection, and natural language report queries
risk_mitigation: Workday API requests are heavily throttled under high concurrency. We mitigate this by implementing a Redis-based cache layer with sliding-window rate limiting.
delivery_model: Consulting fixed-scope implementation: standard deployment is 4 to 6 weeks including secure OAuth configuration and audit logs.

title: Salesforce CRM to OpenAI Agent Integration
use_case: Autonomous lead enrichment, automated meeting transcript logging, and real-time pipeline velocity scoring
risk_mitigation: Data exposure risk. We implement field-level security constraints so the AI agent only reads fields authorized by the user's Salesforce profile context.
delivery_model: Fixed-scope rollout: 3 to 5 weeks depending on custom object complexity and field-level permissions architecture.

title: PostgreSQL Database to Claude Desktop via Custom MCP Server
use_case: Allows developers to execute read-only queries, schema introspection, and index optimization audits using natural language
risk_mitigation: SQL injection and unauthorized database modifications. The MCP server restricts queries to a read-only user session and blocks DDL/DML commands (e.g., DROP, DELETE, UPDATE) at the parser layer.
delivery_model: Custom deployment: 2 weeks. Best suited for development teams looking to speed up internal data exploration workflows safely.
